name: Mero Pro
description: The Mero Pro bundle — three premium designs (marketing classic, blendwit-tech Whitepace aesthetic, vivid Positivus aesthetic) shipped exclusively to Custom-tier customers.
author: Blendwit

designs.name: Mero Marketing (classic)
designs.description: Pastel-character-driven hero, dashboard mockup behind, motion-first copy. The original Mero look.
designs.//pages: Inherits the bundle-level pageSchema + seedData below until/unless overridden. Designs without their own `pages` array fall through to the flat fields, which lets us roll out per-design overrides incrementally.

designs.name: Blendwit Tech (Positivus aesthetic)
designs.description: White canvas, lime-green accents, hard-edged stamped cards, bold sans typography. The Positivus mould adapted as the Blendwit tech-company site — playful + bold + brand-coloured. Brand assets: Blendwit wordmark + circular mark.

data.title: Software people *actually* brag about
data.subtitle: Blendwit is the tech studio behind Mero CMS, opinionated developer tools, and the long tail of small product bets we ship for teams that pick their tools carefully.

data.title: What we build
data.description: Three product lines, one studio. We pick problems where opinionated software outperforms generic platforms — then ship something teams actually want to use.

blocks.title: Mero CMS
blocks.body: A self-hosted CMS for SMBs in markets that are tired of monthly SaaS lock-in. One-time license, plugin marketplace, visual editor that doesn't suck.

blocks.title: Developer tools
blocks.body: Small CLIs, plugins, and SDKs for the workflows we keep hitting at Blendwit and our clients. Free to use, open in spirit, occasionally paid for the deep ones.

blocks.title: Product partnerships
blocks.body: We co-build software with founders. You bring the domain knowledge, we bring engineering velocity. 8-week MVPs, not 18-month consulting engagements.

blocks.title: Mero Cloud
blocks.body: Managed hosting for Mero CMS customers who don't want to run their own infrastructure. Backups, SSL, uptime — we handle it.

blocks.title: Open source
blocks.body: Several of our internal tools are MIT-licensed on GitHub. We use the same components on client work — so what you fork is what we run in production.

blocks.title: Writing & research
blocks.body: Long-form essays on product engineering, the SMB software market, and what we're learning shipping Mero. New piece every month or so.

data.title: How we engage
data.subtitle: Three ways to work with Blendwit. The right one depends on whether you need product, partnership, or just a tool.

tiers.name: Open source
tiers.description: Use our public tools. We're around in GitHub Discussions if you get stuck.

tiers.name: Mero License
tiers.description: Mero CMS Custom-tier license. Three designs, plugin marketplace, your own developers.

tiers.name: Partnership
tiers.description: We co-build your product. 8-week sprints, fixed scope, real software at the end.

data.title: What our clients say
data.description: We don't take many projects. The ones we do, we ship.

testimonials.quote: Blendwit shipped in eight weeks what our previous agency couldn't deliver in a year. Different planet.
testimonials.name: Anjana Pradhan

testimonials.quote: They argued with us when we were wrong, agreed quickly when we were right, and built something we use every day.
testimonials.name: Kiran Shrestha

testimonials.quote: We picked Mero because it didn't try to be everything. The team behind it is the same way — focused, opinionated, fast.
testimonials.name: Mira Tamang

data.title: Got a problem worth solving?
data.subtitle: Send us the messy version. We're good at the messy version.

designs.name: Vivid (Whitepace aesthetic)
designs.description: Deep-navy + yellow-accent SaaS layout in the Whitepace mould. The serious-B2B alternative — built for technology / product-marketing customers who want a calmer, corporate feel.

Hero.label: Design
Hero.description: Pick a Hero layout. All variants share the same content fields — switching is non-destructive.

Hero.label: Hero illustration
Hero.description: The character / illustration shown on the right of the hero. Pick from your media library or paste a URL. Leave empty to hide.

Hero.label: Emblem watermark
Hero.description: Faint watermark behind the hero illustration. Set to 'none' to hide entirely.

Hero.label: Dashboard mockup
Hero.description: The tilted admin UI shown behind the character illustration (split variant only). Pick a variant or hide entirely.

Hero.label: Custom dashboard image
Hero.description: Replace the built-in mockup with your own screenshot. Useful when the customer's actual product is more compelling than a generic admin UI. Leave empty to use the built-in.

FeatureBlocks.label: Design
FeatureBlocks.description: Pick a feature-block layout. All variants share the same data.

itemShape.label: Block image
itemShape.description: Visual shown alongside this feature block.

itemShape.label: Image alt text
itemShape.description: Accessibility — describe the image for screen readers.

itemShape.label: Character image
itemShape.description: Optional illustration shown beside this use case.

Testimonials.label: Design
Testimonials.description: Pick a testimonials layout: carousel (horizontal scroll), grid (3-up cards), or quote-tile (single big quote).

Testimonials.label: Testimonials content
Testimonials.description: Testimonials shown on this section come from your Testimonials collection. Add, edit, or reorder them there — the rendered section automatically reflects the latest list.

FAQ.label: Design
FAQ.description: Pick a FAQ layout: accordion (expandable), two-column (Q-on-left), or inline (flat list).

FinalCTA.label: Decorative emblem
FinalCTA.description: Small emblem shown beside the CTA copy. Leave empty for the default brand emblem.

designs.label: Default — Linktree-vibrant
designs.description: Pastel mesh-gradient hero, vibrant feature visuals, hand-tossed character illustrations.

data.eyebrow: v1.5 just shipped — visual editor in beta
data.title: The CMS your team actually wants to use.
data.subtitle: Mero CMS is the motion-first content platform for teams that treat content as a product. Visual editor, AI Studio, eight-tier capability matrix — all from one admin you'd recommend to a friend.

data.eyebrow: Trusted by teams who pick their tools carefully

Blendwit
Nimble
Fleet
Atlas
Paperline
Union
Sequence
Kite

data.title: Everything a content team needs. Nothing they don't.
data.subtitle: Six core capabilities, each one designed to feel inevitable once you've used it.

blocks.title: Visual page builder
blocks.body: Click any section to edit inline. Drag to reorder. Swap variants without breaking your design system.

blocks.title: AI Studio
blocks.body: Generate copy, alt text, and SEO meta with one keystroke. Your tone, your brand voice, your existing posts as the prompt.

blocks.title: Custom collections
blocks.body: Define any content type with a JSON schema. Mero builds the editor and the public API automatically.

blocks.title: Forms + leads
blocks.body: Drag-and-drop form builder. Submissions land in your lead inbox with email, source, and a one-click reply button.

blocks.title: Webhooks
blocks.body: Slack ping on a new post. Zapier on every form submission. Custom events for your own integrations.

blocks.title: Security by default
blocks.body: JWT + refresh-token rotation. Audit log on every settings change. IP whitelisting per role. Two-factor everywhere.

data.eyebrow: Built for the way you work
data.title: Three teams. Three completely different sites. One CMS.
data.subtitle: Mero adapts to the shape of your content — not the other way around.

cases.title: Lead-gen marketing site
cases.body: Pricing pages, demo signups, gated whitepapers, customer stories, blog. Visual editor for the marketing lead, code editor for the dev.

cases.title: Editorial publication
cases.body: Long-form posts, author bios, taxonomy, newsletters, member-gated archive. Scheduled publishing across timezones.

cases.title: Multi-team brand site
cases.body: About, careers, customers, docs, changelog. Granular roles so legal can edit policies without touching the homepage.

data.title: One-time licence. Eight tiers.
data.subtitle: Pick the tier that matches your team. Lifetime use of the version you bought, optional annual maintenance for updates.

data.title: Teams who switched to Mero, in their own words.
data.subtitle: Six representative quotes from the last 90 days.

testimonials.name: Anjali Shrestha
testimonials.quote: Our editorial team stopped pinging engineering for content changes. That alone paid for the licence in week one.

testimonials.name: Rohan Kapoor
testimonials.quote: We migrated from WordPress in two days. The visual editor is genuinely better than what we replaced.

testimonials.name: Maya Patel
testimonials.quote: AI Studio writes our blog drafts in our voice. I edit, I don't rewrite.

testimonials.name: Daniel Cho
testimonials.quote: The capability matrix is the cleanest tier-gating I've seen. We unlock things by paying, not by integrating.

testimonials.name: Priya Joshi
testimonials.quote: Custom collections meant we shipped a portfolio CMS in an afternoon. The schema-to-editor mapping just works.

testimonials.name: Saugat Pahari
testimonials.quote: We dogfood Mero for our own marketing site. Every feature ships from the team that uses it daily.

items.a: Yes. Buy the licence, deploy to your own infrastructure (or use Mero Cloud if you'd rather we handle hosting). No phone-home, no SaaS lock-in.

items.q: How does the one-time licence work?
items.a: You pay once for the CMS. Your install runs forever on the version you bought. Optional annual maintenance keeps you on the latest version with security patches.
Yes. We have a one-time migration tool that pulls posts, pages, media, users, and tags. Most teams complete the move in under 4 hours.

items.q: What's the difference between Personal and Organizational?
items.a: Personal tiers are sized for solo creators (1-5 seats, smaller storage). Organizational tiers add multi-user from day one, larger storage, and tier-3+ adds dashboard branding.

items.q: Do you have a free tier?
items.a: We have a 14-day free trial on any tier. No card required. After the trial, pick a tier or your data is exported and the install retired.

items.q: Can we build custom features on top?
items.a: Yes. Premium+ tiers include code-level theme editing and a plugin marketplace. Custom tier includes bespoke development scope.

data.title: Stop wrestling with your CMS.
data.subtitle: Spin up a free trial in 90 seconds. No card, no email wall, no sales call required.
data.trustText: Trial includes every Pro-tier feature. Downgrade or commit at the end.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.description: One-time licence with eight tiers across personal and organizational use.

data.title: What's new in Mero CMS.
data.subtitle: We ship every Tuesday. Here's the trail.

items.title: v1.5.0 — Visual editor (beta)
items.body: Inline editing on the public site. Section toolbar. Drag-to-reorder. Variant swaps. Public preview tokens.

items.title: v1.4.0 — AI Studio
items.body: Per-tenant prompt routing. Brand-voice presets. SEO meta + alt-text generators.

items.title: v1.3.0 — Multi-provider payments
items.body: Stripe, Khalti, eSewa. Idempotent webhooks. Order lifecycle hooks.

items.title: v1.2.0 — Plugin gallery
items.body: Tier × theme compatibility matrix. One-click install. Auto-migration on enable.

items.title: v1.1.0 — Custom collections
items.body: JSON-schema driven. Auto-generated admin UI. Public REST API per collection.

pages.title: Roadmap
pages.description: What we're building, in priority order.

data.title: Where Mero is going.
data.subtitle: Public, opinionated, and updated weekly. Vote on what matters via your account.

items.title: Visual editor — GA
items.body: Section locking, undo/redo, multi-user cursors.

items.title: Localization (i18n)
items.body: Per-locale content, fallbacks, RTL support.

items.title: Audit log v2
items.body: Diff view on every settings change. Per-actor filters.

items.title: Workflow + approvals
items.body: Two-step publish, scheduled rollouts, role-based gates.

items.title: Data export (GDPR)
items.body: Self-serve export of all tenant data in standard formats.

items.title: Theme marketplace v2
items.body: Paid themes, royalties, automatic updates.

items.title: Edge image pipeline
items.body: On-the-fly resize, focal-point cropping, AVIF.

items.title: A/B testing
items.body: Split traffic at the section level. Stats inline in the editor.

items.title: Mobile app
items.body: iOS + Android for editors on the go.

pages.title: Terms of service
pages.description: The terms governing your use of Mero CMS.

data.title: Terms of service
data.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026.

data.title: Agreement
data.body:
## 1. Introduction

These Terms govern your use of Mero CMS. By using the service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

## 2. Accounts

You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure. You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.

## 3. Acceptable use

You may not use the service to host illegal content, send spam, or attempt to disrupt the service for other users.

## 4. Payments

Licenses are sold one-time. Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase, no questions asked.

## 5. Liability

The service is provided as-is. We will not be liable for any indirect or consequential damages.

## 6. Changes

We may update these Terms from time to time. We'll notify you of material changes by email.

pages.title: Privacy policy
pages.description: How we collect, use, and protect your data.

data.title: Privacy policy
data.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026.

data.title: Your privacy
data.body:
## What we collect

Account info (name, email), billing info (held by Stripe / Khalti / eSewa — never us), and product usage telemetry.

## What we don't collect

We do not sell your data. We do not run third-party ad pixels. We do not read your content.

## Where data lives

Self-hosted: your servers, your rules. Cloud: Frankfurt (EU customers) or Singapore (APAC). You choose at signup.

## Your rights

Export, delete, or correct your data at any time from Settings → Data.

## Contact

Questions? privacy@mero.cms.

data.title: Security at Mero
data.subtitle: Defense-in-depth, not security theater.

items.title: Encryption
items.body: TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 at rest. Per-tenant key wrapping.

items.title: Authentication
items.body: JWT + refresh-token rotation. WebAuthn 2FA on every account.

items.title: Audit log
items.body: Every settings change is logged with actor, IP, and diff.

items.title: Backups
items.body: Hourly snapshots, 30-day retention, monthly restore drills.

items.title: Disclosure
items.body: Bug bounty live. 90-day disclosure SLA. security.txt published.

items.title: Compliance
items.body: SOC 2 Type II in progress. GDPR-ready DPA available on request.

data.title: Reporting a vulnerability
data.body: Email security@mero.cms with steps to reproduce. We acknowledge within 24 hours and triage within 72. Eligible reports earn bounties up to $5,000.

pages.title: Data processing addendum
pages.description: GDPR-aligned terms for processing personal data.

data.title: Data processing addendum
data.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026.

data.title: DPA
data.body:
## 1. Roles

You are the Controller. Mero CMS is the Processor.

## 2. Subject matter

Processing of personal data submitted to the service by your end users in the course of providing the service.

## 3. Sub-processors

A current list is published at /legal/sub-processors. We notify you 30 days in advance of any addition.

## 4. Security

We implement and maintain the technical and organizational measures described in our Security page.

## 5. International transfers

For EU customers, we rely on EU Standard Contractual Clauses. Data residency in Frankfurt is available.

## 6. Termination

Upon termination, we delete or return all personal data within 30 days, at your option.

testimonials.name: Anjali Shrestha
testimonials.quote: Our editorial team stopped pinging engineering for content changes. That alone paid for the licence in week one.

testimonials.name: Rohan Kapoor
testimonials.quote: We migrated from WordPress in two days. The visual editor is genuinely better than what we replaced.

testimonials.name: Maya Patel
testimonials.quote: AI Studio writes our blog drafts in our voice. I edit, I don't rewrite.

testimonials.name: Daniel Cho
testimonials.quote: The capability matrix is the cleanest tier-gating I've seen. We unlock things by paying, not by integrating.

testimonials.name: Priya Joshi
testimonials.quote: Custom collections meant we shipped a portfolio CMS in an afternoon. The schema-to-editor mapping just works.

testimonials.name: Saugat Pahari
testimonials.quote: We dogfood Mero for our own marketing site. Every feature ships from the team that uses it daily.

blogCategories.name: Product
blogCategories.description: Releases, behind-the-scenes, what we built and why.

blogCategories.name: Engineering
blogCategories.description: How we build Mero — architecture decisions, tech notes.

posts.title: Introducing Mero CMS 1.4
posts.excerpt: Forms in Basic, contract-driven branding, and four new starter themes — what's new in the April 2026 release.
posts.content: 1.4 is the biggest release we've shipped. Here's what changed and why.

posts.title: Why we rebuilt pricing
posts.excerpt: Single prices replaced ranges, forms moved to Basic, and Mero Cloud got its own tier table.
posts.content: Pricing was creating signup friction. Here's how we fixed it.

posts.title: How the branding contract works
posts.excerpt: Themes declare the CSS variables they respect; the admin renders only those controls. Here's the architecture.
posts.content: A simple JSON contract removed half the bespoke admin code we used to maintain.

team.name: Saugat Pahari
team.bio: Building Mero CMS from Kathmandu. Previously product engineer at a Y Combinator startup.

team.name: Aarav Sharma
team.bio: 10 years across Rails, Node, and now NestJS. Believes in boring tech that ships.

team.name: Niraj Khatri
team.bio: Designs systems that age well. Lighthouse 100s, accessible by default.

services.name: Theme development
services.description: Custom themes built against the Mero contract. Fixed-price, 4-week sprint.

services.name: Plugin development
services.description: Bespoke plugins shipped to your install or to the public marketplace.

services.name: Migration
services.description: Move from WordPress, Contentful, or Strapi to Mero. We handle data, redirects, and DNS cutover.

widgetCatalog.name: Hero
widgetCatalog.description: Big headline + subhead + dual CTAs. The signature top-of-page section.

fields.label: Design
fields.description: Pick a Hero layout. All variants share the same content fields — switching is non-destructive.

fields.label: Hero illustration
fields.description: The character / illustration shown on the right of the hero. Pick from your media library or paste a URL. Leave empty to hide.

fields.label: Emblem watermark
fields.description: Faint watermark behind the hero illustration. Set to 'none' to hide entirely.

fields.label: Dashboard mockup
fields.description: The tilted admin UI shown behind the character illustration (split variant only). Pick a variant or hide entirely.

fields.label: Custom dashboard image
fields.description: Replace the built-in mockup with your own screenshot. Useful when the customer's actual product is more compelling than a generic admin UI. Leave empty to use the built-in.

widgetCatalog.name: Page Hero
widgetCatalog.description: Compact hero for inner pages — eyebrow + title + subtitle + CTAs.

widgetCatalog.name: Rich Content
widgetCatalog.description: Markdown-formatted body text. Use for legal pages, articles, long-form copy.

widgetCatalog.name: List Section
widgetCatalog.description: Title + an array of items (each with title, body, optional link). Great for case studies, careers, doc tiles.

widgetCatalog.name: Logo Strip
widgetCatalog.description: Eyebrow + a horizontal row of customer / partner logos.

widgetCatalog.name: Stats Band
widgetCatalog.description: Four chunky numbers with labels. Great for credibility metrics.

widgetCatalog.name: Final CTA
widgetCatalog.description: Big closing call-to-action — title + subtitle + dual buttons.

fields.label: Decorative emblem
fields.description: Small emblem shown beside the CTA copy. Leave empty for the default brand emblem.

widgetCatalog.name: Feature Blocks
widgetCatalog.description: Grid of feature cards with icon, title, body, optional bullet list.

fields.label: Design
fields.description: Pick a feature-block layout. All variants share the same data.

itemShape.label: Block image
itemShape.description: Visual shown alongside this feature block.

itemShape.label: Image alt text
itemShape.description: Accessibility — describe the image for screen readers.

widgetCatalog.name: Use Cases
widgetCatalog.description: Three columns of use-case stories with icon + title + body. Best on landing pages.

itemShape.label: Character image
itemShape.description: Optional illustration shown beside this use case.

widgetCatalog.name: Pricing Teaser
widgetCatalog.description: Three-tier pricing table with feature lists, price, and a CTA per tier.

widgetCatalog.name: Testimonials Carousel
widgetCatalog.description: Sliding carousel of customer quotes with name, role, optional avatar.

fields.label: Design
fields.description: Pick a testimonials layout: carousel (horizontal scroll), grid (3-up cards), or quote-tile (single big quote).

fields.label: Testimonials content
fields.description: Testimonials shown on this section come from your Testimonials collection. Add, edit, or reorder them there — the rendered section automatically reflects the latest list.

widgetCatalog.name: FAQ Accordion
widgetCatalog.description: Expandable Q&A list. Click a question to reveal the answer.

fields.label: Design
fields.description: Pick a FAQ layout: accordion (expandable), two-column (Q-on-left), or inline (flat list).

widgetCatalog.name: Contact Form
widgetCatalog.description: Customizable contact form — name, email, message, custom submit label.

widgetCatalog.name: Carousel
widgetCatalog.description: Auto-rotating slides with prev/next + dots. Hero replacement for product launches.

widgetCatalog.name: Video
widgetCatalog.description: Embed YouTube, Vimeo, or a direct MP4. Lazy-loaded iframe, custom poster optional.

widgetCatalog.name: Gallery
widgetCatalog.description: Responsive image grid with built-in lightbox. Captions optional.

widgetCatalog.name: Accordion
widgetCatalog.description: Collapsible disclosure list — long-form Q&A, install steps, troubleshooting.

widgetCatalog.name: Tabs
widgetCatalog.description: Tab strip + content panes. Great for "how it works" walkthroughs and role-based content.

widgetCatalog.name: Countdown
widgetCatalog.description: Live-updating timer to a target date. Days / hours / minutes / seconds tiles.

widgetCatalog.name: Pricing Table
widgetCatalog.description: Full pricing comparison: 2-4 tiers with feature checklists and a featured ring.

widgetCatalog.name: Comparison Table
widgetCatalog.description: Side-by-side feature comparison vs. competitors. Highlight your column.

widgetCategories.label: Headers & CTAs
widgetCategories.description: Big top-of-page sections and call-to-action blocks.

widgetCategories.label: Content
widgetCategories.description: Body content — text, lists, features, FAQs.
